name: Friends
description: The one with all the Central Perk regulars

questions.q: What is Ross Geller's profession on the show?

source.notes: Eventually becomes a tenured professor at NYU.

questions.q: What is Chandler Bing's full middle name?

source.notes: Chandler Muriel Bing. His mother chose a feminine middle name.

questions.q: Which infamous phrase does Ross use to justify sleeping with someone else during an argument with Rachel?

source.notes: Originally from the season 3 storyline. Recurring running gag.

questions.q: What was Rachel's last name?

source.notes: Later briefly 'Ross' after their Vegas wedding. Played by Jennifer Aniston.

questions.q: Joey plays the heart-throb doctor Drake Ramoray on which fictional soap opera?

source.notes: Joey is later killed off when his character falls down an elevator shaft.

questions.q: What is the name of Ross's son from his first marriage?

source.notes: Born to Ross and Carol in Season 1. Mother is Ross's lesbian ex-wife.

questions.q: Ross's first wife, Carol, left him because she realized she was what?

source.notes: Carol marries her partner Susan in Season 2.

questions.q: What are the names of Monica and Chandler's adopted twins in the series finale?

source.notes: Named after the birth mother (Erica) and Monica's father (Jack).

questions.q: What is the title of Phoebe's signature song, performed regularly at Central Perk?

source.notes: 'Smelly cat, smelly cat, what are they feeding you?' Written by Lisa Kudrow and Michael Skloff.

questions.q: What is the name of the barista at Central Perk who has a long-running crush on Rachel?

source.notes: Played by James Michael Tyler. Signature bleached blonde hair.

questions.q: Who guest-starred as Will Colbert, Ross's formerly-overweight high school friend who hates Rachel?

source.notes: Appeared in 'The One with the Rumor' (Season 8, 2001) while married to Jennifer Aniston.

questions.q: What is the name of Joey's treasured stuffed animal?

source.notes: His 'bedtime penguin pal.' Subject of a custody battle with Ben.

questions.q: Which actor played the much-older Richard, Monica's boyfriend and family friend?

source.notes: Tom Selleck's character is an ophthalmologist who's 21 years older than Monica.

questions.q: Which actor portrayed Chandler Bing for all 10 seasons of Friends?

source.notes: Perry passed away in October 2023. The show aired 1994-2004 on NBC.

questions.q: What country is Paolo, Rachel's attractive early-seasons boyfriend, from?

source.notes: Lives in Ross's building. Speaks only a few words of English.

questions.q: What high school did Monica, Ross, and Rachel all attend together?

source.notes: Located in Westchester County, New York.

questions.q: What is the name of Joey's agent, a chain-smoking elderly woman?

source.notes: Estelle Leonard. Played by June Gable.

questions.q: Which famous quote does Joey associate with his favorite food?
choices: Keep your hands off my grub!

source.notes: Said to his date Sarah when she takes his fries.

questions.q: In the show's opening sequence, where do the Friends dance in a fountain?

source.notes: The fountain was on the Warner Bros. backlot, not a real NYC location.

questions.q: Who played Phoebe Buffay's twin sister Ursula?

source.notes: Kudrow played both roles. Ursula first appeared on 'Mad About You' before 'Friends.'
